languages.text: "Я не стану отрицать своих действий, Вольный Торговец. Да, действительно, я внес в конструкцию сервиторов несколько экспериментальных поправок, увеличивающих их производительность и эффективность выполнения задач — но разве это не увеличивает их полезность? Суть обвинений магоса Ханейманна ускользает от меня".

"I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."
languages.original_text: "Я не стану отрицать своих действий, Вольный Торговец. Да, действительно, я внес в конструкцию сервиторов несколько экспериментальных поправок, увеличивающих их производительность и эффективность выполнения задач — но разве это не увеличивает их полезность? Суть обвинений магоса Ханейманна ускользает от меня".

traits.locale_text: "I shall not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not augment their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

But does this not augment their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. languages.text: "Ich leugne nicht, was ich getan habe, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich habe an der Konstruktion der Servitoren in der Tat einige experimentelle Modifikationen vorgenommen, die ihre Produktivität und Effizienz erhöhen. Aber steigert das nicht ihren Nutzen? Die Essenz von Magos Haneumanns Vorwürfen erschließt sich mir nicht."
languages.original_text: "I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich leugne nicht, was ich getan habe, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich habe an der Konstruktion der Servitoren in der Tat einige experimentelle Modifikationen vorgenommen, die ihre Produktivität und Effizienz erhöhen. Aber steigert das nicht ihren Nutzen? Die Essenz von Magos Haneumanns Vorwürfen erschließt sich mir nicht."

languages.text: « Je ne nie pas mes actes, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'ai en effet apporté plusieurs modifications expérimentales à la conception des servitors visant à améliorer leur productivité et l'efficacité avec laquelle ils accomplissent leurs tâches. Mais cela ne renforce-t-il pas leur utilité ? Je ne comprends pas vraiment le fond des accusations portées par le magos Haneumann. »
languages.original_text: "I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne nie pas mes actes, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'ai en effet apporté plusieurs modifications expérimentales à la conception des servitors visant à améliorer leur productivité et l'efficacité avec laquelle ils accomplissent leurs tâches. Mais cela ne renforce-t-il pas leur utilité ? Je ne comprends pas vraiment le fond des accusations portées par le magos Haneumann. »

languages.text: “行商浪人，我不否认我的所作所为。我确实对机仆的结构进行了一些实验性改造，以提高其生产力与任务效率。可它们的效能没有因此加强吗？我实在不明白哈努曼贤者指控我的核心是什么。”
languages.original_text: "I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人，我不否认我的所作所为。我确实对机仆的结构进行了一些实验性改造，以提高其生产力与任务效率。可它们的效能没有因此加强吗？我实在不明白哈努曼贤者指控我的核心是什么。”

languages.text: «No niego mis acciones, Comerciante Independiente. Efectivamente, he introducido modificaciones experimentales en la construcción de los servidores para aumentar su productividad y la eficacia de sus tareas. ¿Acaso eso no aumenta su utilidad? No logro entender la esencia de las acusaciones del magos Haneumann».
languages.original_text: "I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

traits.locale_text: «No niego mis acciones, Comerciante Independiente. Efectivamente, he introducido modificaciones experimentales en la construcción de los servidores para aumentar su productividad y la eficacia de sus tareas. ¿Acaso eso no aumenta su utilidad? No logro entender la esencia de las acusaciones del magos Haneumann».

languages.text: "ローグ・トレーダーよ、私の行動を否定するつもりはない。確かに、私はサーヴィターの構造にいくつかの実験的な改造を導入した。彼らの生産性と作業効率を向上させる改造だ。しかし、これは彼らの実用性を高めるものではないのか？マゴス・ハネウマンの告発の本質が私にはわからない。"
languages.original_text: "I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

languages.text: "Eylemlerimi inkâr etmiyorum Hür Tacir. Gerçekten de hizmetörlerin yapısına, üretkenliklerini ve görev verimliliklerini artıran birkaç deneysel değişiklik getirdim. Fakat bu onların faydasını artırmıyor mu? Magos Haneumann'ın suçlamalarının özünü kavrayamıyorum."
languages.original_text: "I do not deny my actions, Rogue Trader. Indeed, I have introduced several experimental modifications to the servitors' construction, modifications that increase their productivity and task efficiency. But does this not enhance their utility? The essence of Magos Haneumann's accusations eludes me."

traits.locale_text: "Eylemlerimi inkâr etmiyorum Hür Tacir. Gerçekten de hizmetörlerin yapısına, üretkenliklerini ve görev verimliliklerini artıran birkaç deneysel değişiklik getirdim. Fakat bu onların faydasını artırmıyor mu? Magos Haneumann'ın suçlamalarının özünü kavrayamıyorum."
